zh.Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Venables於1365年出生在英國爾金德頓時，他的父親Hugh de Venables35歲，母親Margery Cotton30歲。他於1382年與Isabel de Langton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月23日在英國爾諾維其享年38歲，埋葬在英國爾金德頓。

zh-hans.Kinderton-cum-Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Venables于1365年出生在英国爾金德頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Venables35岁，母亲Margery Cotton30岁。他于1382年与Isabel de Langton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年7月23日在英国爾諾維其享年38岁，埋葬在英国爾金德頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Venables was born in 1365, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh de Venables, was 35 and his mother, Margery Cotton, was 30. He married Isabel de Langton in 1382, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 July 1403, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Venables est né en 1365, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery Cotton, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Langton en 1382, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1403, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Venables 1365 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Venables 35 und seine Mutter Margery Cotton 30. Er hat 1382 in Cheshire, England Isabel de Langton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Juli 1403 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Northwich, Cheshire, England und wurde in Kinderton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Venables è nato il nel 1365 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margery Cotton, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Langton nel 1382, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 luglio 1403, nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Venablesが1365年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは35歳，母Margery Cottonは30歳であった。1382年にイギリスチェシュアイアでIsabel de Langtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年7月23日にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで38歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Venables(이)가 1365년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Cotton(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1382년 영국 체실르에서 Isabel de Langton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 23일 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 킨더턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Venables nasceu em 1365, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margery Cotton, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Langton em 1382, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1403, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Venables родился в 1365 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Cotton, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Langton в 1382 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 июля 1403 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Venables nació en 1365, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margery Cotton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Isabel de Langton en 1382, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de julio de 1403, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
